mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM oa_notification WHERE receiver_id = #{receiverId} AND status = 'UNREAD'
SELECT business_type AS businessType, COUNT(*) AS count FROM oa_notification WHERE receiver_id = #{receiverId} AND status = 'UNREAD' GROUP BY business_type
mapper.update:
UPDATE oa_notification SET status = 'READ', read_time = NOW() WHERE id IN
#{id}
UPDATE oa_notification SET status = 'READ', read_time = NOW() WHERE receiver_id = #{receiverId} AND status = 'UNREAD'
